Quick summary:
- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg × 12.4 kg = 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg × 9.1 kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg × 15.7 kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10

PK status:
- The dosing config looks internally consistent.
- All three patients have defined PK clearance values.
- I don’t see any red flags from the config itself.

Caveat:
- I only checked the current dosing file, not live monitoring or recent model run logs, so I can say “nothing obviously unstable in the dosing parameters,” but not confirm full PK model health from this alone.

If you want, I can also format this into an email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
